name: Block Break Animation
desc: Shows block break progress (crack stages 0-9) on a block. Sent by all players, not just the miner.

fields.name: entityId
fields.desc: Entity breaking the block (-1 = stop animation)

implementation.overview: S25 displays block break cracks (stages 0-9). Entity ID shows who's breaking it. -1 stops the animation. No module in the examined client sources directly targets this packet — the visual break animation is handled entirely by vanilla rendering.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S25PacketBlockBreakAnim)
modules.purpose: Server sends S25PacketBlockBreakAnim to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
